# services.syncplay

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.syncplay`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.syncplay.certDir` | `null or absolute path` | TLS certificates directory to use for encryption. See <https://github.com/Syncplay/syncplay/wiki/TLS-support>. |
| `services.syncplay.chat` | `boolean` | Chat with users in the same room. |
| `services.syncplay.enable` | `boolean` | If enabled, start the Syncplay server. |
| `services.syncplay.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Additional arguments to be passed to the service. |
| `services.syncplay.interfaceIpv4` | `string` | The IP address to bind to for IPv4. Leaving it empty defaults to using all. |
| `services.syncplay.interfaceIpv6` | `string` | The IP address to bind to for IPv6. Leaving it empty defaults to using all. |
| `services.syncplay.ipv4Only` | `boolean` | Listen only on IPv4 when strting the server. |
| `services.syncplay.ipv6Only` | `boolean` | Listen only on IPv6 when strting the server. |
| `services.syncplay.isolateRooms` | `boolean` | Enable room isolation. |
| `services.syncplay.maxChatMessageLength` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Maximum number of characters in a chat message. |
| `services.syncplay.maxUsernameLength` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Maximum number of characters in a username. |
| `services.syncplay.motd` | `null or string` | Text to display when users join. The motd will be readable in the nix store and the processlist. If this is not intended use `motdFile` instead. Will be overriden by {option}`services.syncplay.motdFile`. |
| `services.syncplay.motdFile` | `null or string` | Path to text to display when users join. Will override {option}`services.syncplay.motd`. |
| `services.syncplay.package` | `package` | The syncplay-nogui package to use. |
| `services.syncplay.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the file that contains the server password. If `null`, the server doesn't require a password. |
| `services.syncplay.permanentRooms` | `list of string` | List of rooms that will be listed even if the room is empty. Will be overriden by {option}`services.syncplay.permanentRoomsFile`. |
| `services.syncplay.permanentRoomsFile` | `null or string` | File with list of rooms that will be listed even if the room is empty, newline delimited. Will override {option}`services.syncplay.permanentRooms`. |
| `services.syncplay.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port to bind to. |
| `services.syncplay.ready` | `boolean` | Check readiness of users. |
| `services.syncplay.roomsDBFile` | `null or string` | Path to SQLite database file to store room states. Relative to the working directory provided by systemd. |
| `services.syncplay.salt` | `null or string` | Salt to allow room operator passwords generated by this server instance to still work when the server is restarted. The salt will be readable in the nix store and the processlist. If this is not intended use `saltFile` instead. Mutually exclusive with {option}`services.syncplay.saltFile`. |
| `services.syncplay.saltFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the file that contains the server salt. This allows room operator passwords generated by this server instance to still work when the server is restarted. `null`, the server doesn't load the salt from a file. Mutually exclusive with {option}`services.syncplay.salt`. |
| `services.syncplay.statsDBFile` | `null or string` | Path to SQLite database file to store stats. Relative to the working directory provided by systemd. |
| `services.syncplay.useACMEHost` | `null or string` | If set, use NixOS-generated ACME certificate with the specified name for TLS. Note that it requires {option}`security.acme` to be setup, e.g., credentials provided if using DNS-01 validation. |
